To refresh the bundled Agent Studio project trees from the Python ADK repo (canonical source),
from the adk-rs repo root:

  rsync -a ../adk/src/poly/tests/test_projects/ adk-cli/tests/fixtures/test_projects/

Adjust ../adk if your Python ADK checkout lives elsewhere.

Rust CLI expects project.yaml at each project root. After syncing, keep:

  test_projects/test_project/project.yaml
  test_projects/test_empty_project/project.yaml

These files are not part of the Python tree and must remain.

The `adk-core` crate also reads this tree in unit/integration tests (`tests/project_fixture_test.rs`).
